scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,simulator,frontend -c cyan,magenta,green "cd backend && DEMO_MODE=false npm run dev" "cd backend && DEMO_MODE=false npm run simulator" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.db:init: npm run backend:migrate && npm run backend:seed
scripts.verify: npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:build
scripts.verify:full: npm run backend:migrate && npm run backend:seed && npm run verify
